original_image_tags: A single sheet of off-white, aged paper with a ragged right edge. The page is mostly blank, with faint, illegible markings visible on the reverse side through the paper. Two punched holes are visible at the top center. At the bottom center, an inverted (upside-down) blue stamp reads:

elements.description: A faded blue ink stamp oriented upside down at the bottom of the page. The legible text reads 'RECEIVED', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', and 'F.B.I.'. A date and time are visible but partially illegible, appearing to be 'SEP 9 3:16 PM' followed by a year. Other faint text below is illegible.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence and orientation of the single blue stamp and do not contradict each other on any quoted or visual content.
